top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
  AND m.label NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.label
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a ON m2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element IN ('As', 'Be', 'Cd', 'Cr6+', 'Co', 'Ni', 'As', 'Pb', 'Hg', 'Se', 'Si', 'Ti', 'Zn')
       OR m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
       OR m2.label LIKE '%carcin%'
  )
  AND m.label NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m3.label
    FROM molecule m3
    JOIN...

SELECT DISTINCT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
  AND a1.element != a2.element
  AND m.label NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.label
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a ON m2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element IN ('C', 'H', 'O', 'N', 'Cl', 'Br', 'F', 'I')
    GROUP BY m2.molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(...

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
  AND a1.element IS NOT NULL
  AND a2.element IS NOT NULL
  AND m.label NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.label
    FROM molecule m2
    WHERE m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
       OR m2.label LIKE '%carcin%'
       OR m2.label LIKE '%toxic%'
  )
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label...
